final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original brand guidelines poster for RAN QIU, an Eastern-inspired autumn fragrance brand.

Style/medium: clean editorial layout, minimalist brand guidelines poster with Swiss typography influence
Subject: "染秋 (RAN QIU)" brand identity system display showing primary color, secondary color, and typography specifications
Composition: grid-based layout with three distinct sections for color swatches and typography specimens, generous white space, centered alignment
Color palette: warm autumn terracotta as primary anchor, muted sage green as secondary, cream/off-white background, deep charcoal for text
Text (verbatim): "染秋", "RAN QIU", "桂花乌龙", "琥珀枫叶", "柿霜暮色"
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, flat color swatches with hex codes implied, clean sans-serif and serif typography pairing
Constraints: must clearly separate primary color, secondary color, and typography sections; all Chinese characters must render accurately; suitable for brand guideline documentation
Avoid: cluttered layout, western-centric design tropes, gradient overload, stock photography, decorative flourishes, illegible small text
